summary: Wrote Japanese notification_service progress report: corrected-center Ramsey/T2star repeat is running at 1/6 averages with healthy monitor/count evidence; narrow weak-pi center refresh supports using 3.8761166667 GHz and downgrades the old 1.593 MHz Ramsey feature as likely residual detuning rather than supported 13C; no explicit bridge-free task is pending, and terminal Ramsey review is the next expected step.

notification_service_media.caption: narrow weak-pi pODMR center refresh: updated center 3.8761166667 GHz
